command_eng: At noon every day, announce the lunch menu of the 301 building cafeteria through the speaker.

args.Text: The lunch menu for 301 building cafeteria is $GetMenu

joi_block.name: Scenario
joi_block.script:
GetMenu = (#MenuProvider).menuProvider_getMenu("오늘 301동식당 점심")
(#Speaker).speaker_speak("The lunch menu for 301 building cafeteria is " + GetMenu)
